personas.name: The Stable User (Baseline Building)
personas.goal: Show the judges how the EMA smoothing prevents false positives.

interactions.text: Hey, just logging in to do my daily check-in.
Work was pretty standard today. Nothing crazy.
Thinking about what to make for dinner.

personas.expected_outcome: Risk stays below 0.2. Z-Score stays near 0.0. UI remains calm.

personas.name: The Masker (The 'Fake Smile')
personas.goal: Demonstrate the core killer feature: multimodal contradiction.

interactions.text: I am having a really great time today, no worries.

personas.name: The Night Spiral (The SOS Trigger)
personas.goal: Show temporal risk escalation, the night multiplier, and the fail-safe override.

interactions.text: Can't sleep. My mind is just racing right now.
I just feel like everything is falling apart.
I can't do this anymore. It's too much.
